title: Gårding's convexity input (lem:garding) cited only; 'self-contained up to Gårding' framing overstates rigor

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: Lemma `lem:garding` (convexity of $\lambda_1$ / concavity of $\lambda_{\min}$ / convexity of the hyperbolicity cone $\Lambda$) is genuinely nontrivial (Gårding 1959) and is used inside Step 1 of the BGLS proof sketch. Citing it is acceptable, but combined with the unproved compound construction (see the BGLS issue) it means the stated 'key analytic input … a convexity statement for hyperbolic polynomials' is taken as a black box rather than derived. The solution should either (i) state Gårding's theorem precisely as an external citation and drop the 'self-contained' claim, or (ii) include the short standard proof that convexity of $\Lambda$ $\Leftrightarrow$ concavity of $\lambda_{\min}$ and apply it to $-z$ for convexity of $\lambda_1$.
